calendar.matters: NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Reset To May-26-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Abuse/Dependent Adult TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312, Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petitioner: Bertha Bell present in pro per.

No appearance by the Respondent: David Doe.

The Court stated that the service on the Respondent was not good and that he would have to be properly served. Ms. Bell stated that the Sheriff did go to the Respondent's house. The Court informed Ms. Bell that the service was not effective and continued the matter to May 26, 2010 at 11:00 a.m. in Department 204 for proper service on the Respondent. The TRO was reissued and will expire on May 26, 2010. Ms. Bell provided a brief description of the Respondent on the record.
